canonical_mechanisms.canonical: Caseless single-PCB design — cost savings reinvested in components
raw_variants: designed on a single multiple-layer circuit board using high quality components
no need for an outer case — by saving this cost, high quality components could be used to guarantee the best possible sound
single PCB design with no case — cost savings passed on
deep bass line synthesizer with sequencer
app-controlled animations and pixel art creation
